ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- if (vars.pomContent == null) null else (((read(vars.pomContent, "application/xml")).project.artifactId) as String default null)

%dw 2.0 output application/java import * from java!com::governanceplus::reviewermule::ruleengine::GlobMatcher fun appliesToProject(pattern) = (isEmpty(pattern default "")) or (vars.projectArtifactId == null) or (matchGlob(pattern, vars.projectArtifactId)) --- vars.xmlRuleRows filter (appliesToProject($.PROJECT_NAME_PATTERN))

%dw 2.0 output application/java import * from java!com::governanceplus::reviewermule::ruleengine::GlobMatcher fun appliesToProject(pattern) = (isEmpty(pattern default "")) or (vars.projectArtifactId == null) or (matchGlob(pattern, vars.projectArtifactId)) --- vars.pomRuleRows filter (appliesToProject($.PROJECT_NAME_PATTERN))

%dw 2.0 output application/java import * from java!com::governanceplus::reviewermule::ruleengine::GlobMatcher fun appliesToProject(pattern) = (isEmpty(pattern default "")) or (vars.projectArtifactId == null) or (matchGlob(pattern, vars.projectArtifactId)) --- vars.swaggerRuleRows filter (appliesToProject($.PROJECT_NAME_PATTERN))

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((vars.muleFileList default []) filter ((not $.attributes.directory) and ((upper($.attributes.path)) endsWith '.XML'))) map $.attributes.path]
#[output application/java --- (vars.muleFileContents default []) ++ [{ path: payload, content: write(vars.fileReadResult, "text/xml") }]]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 import * from java!com::governanceplus::reviewermule::ruleengine::XPathEvaluator output application/java var rulesJson = write(vars.applicableXmlRules map ((r) -> { id: r.ID, description: r.DESCRIPTION, xpath: r.XPATH }), "application/json") --- (vars.muleFileContents default []) flatMap ((file) -> read(evaluateXmlRulesAsJson(file.content, file.path, vars.projectDir, rulesJson), "application/json") )

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((vars.apiFileList default []) filter ((not $.attributes.directory) and (((upper($.attributes.path)) endsWith '.YAML') or ((upper($.attributes.path)) endsWith '.YML') or ((upper($.attributes.path)) endsWith '.JSON')))) map $.attributes.path]

#[%dw 2.0 import * from java!com::governanceplus::reviewermule::ruleengine::SwaggerRuleEvaluator output application/java var rulesJson = write(vars.applicableSwaggerRules map ((r) -> { id: r.ID, description: r.DESCRIPTION, jsonPath: r.JSON_PATH }), 'application/json') --- read(evaluateSwaggerRulesAsJson(vars.specReadResult as String {encoding: 'UTF-8'}, vars.specFileName, rulesJson), 'application/json')]
